OmniScript.description: Captures candidates' responses to a set of questions that determine their eligibility for the trial.
OmniScript.name: TrialManagement_CandidateEligibilityInfluenza

omniProcessElements.name: CandidateEligibilityIntegrationProcedureAction
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "CandidateEligibilityIntegrationProcedureAction", "integrationProcedureKey" : "TrialManagement_GetCandidiateEligibilityResult", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "" : "" }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ] }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: Check Candidate Eligibility
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Provide Consent", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3.0, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3.0, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "typeFilter" : "" }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ] }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: Are_you_suffering_from_frequent_chest_congestion
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Are you suffering from frequent chest congestion?", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "checkLabel" : "Are you suffering from frequent chest congestion?", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Do_you_have_family_history_of_Asthma
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Do you have family history of Asthma?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "No", "value" : "No", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Show Eligible Candidate Result
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Know Your Eligibility", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3.0, "nextLabel" : "Close", "nextWidth" : "3", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "isEligible" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ] }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: NavigateAction

omniProcessElements.name: Show Ineligible Candidate Result
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "label" : "Know Your Eligibility", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3.0, "nextLabel" : "Close", "nextWidth" : "3", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "

Sorry!! You are not eligible for trail

", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "false", "condition" : "=", "field" : "isEligible" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ] }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
